results.title: LEGION BASEBALL: Hawks hold off visiting Mountain View
results.description: CHEYENNE – Senior Alex Vines went 4-for-5 with two doubles, a triple and five RBI to help the Cheyenne Hawks hold off Mountain View High of Loveland, Colorado, 18-14 on Sunday at Powers Field in Cheyenne.

results.title: Lock Upp 2: Yogesh Rawat gets evicted; fans question makers over ‘unfair gameplay’ and alleged bias
results.description: Yogesh Rawat was evicted from Lock Upp 2 after a buzzer challenge and Dheeraj Dhoopar's decision. Fans expressed disappointment online, criticizing the show's fairness and task opportunities. Some viewers felt Yogesh Rawat deserved better treatment during the competition. Others acknowledged the unpredictable nature of reality show formats. Many fans wished Yogesh Rawat success for his future television appearances.

results.title: Rapp, 26, dies after being hit by car while cycling
results.description: American boxer Hannah Rapp died on Saturday after being hit by a car while cycling in Texas. Rapp, 26, was passed by a car which suddenly came to a stop then reversed into her, according to the Brazos County sheriff’s office. The driver has been arrested and charged with manslaughter. results.title: Patient dies hours after ceiling fan falls on him at Delhi hospital

results.title: Unable to fight back tears, Argentina coach Lionel Scaloni leaves World Cup final press conference midway
results.description: Lionel Scaloni broke down in tears after Argentina's FIFA World Cup 2026 final defeat to Spain, leaving his post-match press conference midway after being asked about his future. The Argentina coach admitted he was unsure whether he would continue beyond his contract, raising fresh questions over his long-term role after one of the most successful eras in the nation's football history.

results.title: Rubio: US remains open to a diplomatic solution with Iran
results.description: US Secretary of State Marco Rubio said the United States remains open to a diplomatic solution with Iran despite the ongoing strikes.

results.title: RIL, ICICI Bank Report healthy Q1 Earnings | Will Global Sentiment Check Mate Bulls? | Opening Bell
results.description: US forces conclude 9th consecutive days of strikes against Iran. Iran said it attacked US targets in Bahrain, Jordan, Kuwait, Oman, Qatar and Syria. Oil rallies 4.5% on Friday; Brent crosses $90 on Monday morning. US markets on Friday: Dow, S&P 500 & Nasdaq slip 0.8-1.4%. US-Iran tensions & Semiconductor volatility hit sentiment. VanEck Semiconductor ETF falls over 4%. US yields and dollar range bound on strong consumer sentiment data. Asian markets mixed; Kospi drops, S&P 200 rises. Japanese markets closed for a holiday. Gold prices up 1.1% at $4,015.09 per ⁠ounce. GIFT Nifty indicates muted start for Indian equities

results.title: China Warns UK Over British Steel Takeover as Beijing Demands Compensation
results.description: China demands compensation from the UK after British Steel's nationalisation, citing a breach of the bilateral investment treaty. The UK defends its decision, aiming to protect jobs and steelmaking capacity.

results.title: Indo-MIM IPO: Price band set at ₹461-485 per share; check key dates, issue details
results.description: The Indo-MIM IPO, scheduled for July 23-27, features a price band of ₹461-485 per share and aims to raise ₹500 crore. The company intends to use the funds for debt repayment and corporate purposes, with allocations allocated to different investor categories.
